overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot flying through a futuristic industrial cityscape reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077, featuring towering mega-structures, construction cranes, and steam vents. The camera navigates a narrow corridor between industrial buildings before banking right to reveal a coastal view with distant mountains across the water.

agents.ego_description: piloting a drone steadily through the narrow industrial canyon, maintaining altitude between the towering structures while navigating past steam vents

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel industrial complex with curved architectural elements and ventilation grilles
tall green-patina industrial tower with exposed scaffolding and metal walkways
large yellow construction crane extending across the sky between buildings
multiple vents emitting white steam into the corridor

segments.scene_description: The drone flies through a narrow industrial canyon flanked by massive concrete mega-structures. Steam rises from ventilation systems in the center of the corridor while construction cranes loom overhead against a clear blue sky.

events.description: camera banks right, revealing coastal water and distant mountains beyond the industrial structures

agents.ego_description: banking the drone to the right to navigate around the industrial tower, revealing the coastal landscape and ocean view ahead

entered.detail: expansive blue ocean visible through the gap between industrial buildings
hazy mountains visible across the water on the horizon
mechanical structures and ventilation units covering the rooftops below

segments.scene_description: The drone begins a right turn, causing the left mega-structure to fall behind while the right green tower shifts to center frame. As the camera banks, an expansive coastal view opens up with blue water and distant mountains becoming visible beyond the industrial rooftops.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal industrial overlook with ocean view

events.description: completing the right turn and stabilizing along the new flight path parallel to the coastline

agents.ego_description: flying past the industrial tower with the coastal water now dominating the right side of the view, maintaining steady altitude over the rooftop structures

entered.detail: large white tensile structure covering a rooftop area
industrial bridge or walkway structure extending toward the water

segments.scene_description: Having completed the turn, the drone flies parallel to the coastline with the green industrial tower now on the left and the open water on the right. A distinctive white tensile roof structure and elevated industrial bridge become prominent as the camera moves over the complex rooftop terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial canyon into an expansive coastal vista. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor flanked by massive concrete mega-structures, with steam rising from ventilation systems and construction cranes looming overhead against a clear blue sky. As the camera banks to the right, the left-hand structures fall away and a green tower shifts to the center of the frame, gradually revealing a wide expanse of blue water and distant mountains beyond the rooftops. The scene then opens fully as the drone completes its turn to fly parallel to the coastline, leaving the green tower to the left while the open sea stretches to the right. Finally, the camera moves over a complex rooftop terrain, passing a distinctive white tensile roof structure and an elevated industrial bridge.
